title: 荣誉附件正文｜LOA full（第14部分）
content:
t purchased with the TL Research Grant.

Entertainment & Allowable Refreshment In accordance with the Refreshments and Entertainment guidelines. Fines and Not allowable Penalties GST Allowable For expenses incurred with purchases made with the TL Research Grant. Note: If there are GST included in the expenses, select tax code STD-PA in iExpense when submitting the claims (do not select STD-NC) so that the system will compute the applicable GST from the claim amount accordingly. Temasek Laboratories @ SUTD Page 5 Circular – Temasek Lab Grants Date: October 2017 Type of Expenses Description Insurance Not allowable Premiums The University is responsible for the insurance of the equipment, relevant workmen compensation and professional indemnity insurance which are in line with the University’s risk policies. Legal Fees Not allowable Overhead Allowable Expenses - Rental, Utilities, Only for DIRP projects as those allow 20% overheads. Telephone Charges, Facilities TL direct grant, TRF and SEED projects do not allow any overheads. Management, etc Photocopying Allowable Charges Professional Fees Not allowable (including Fees to Consultants) Professional Not allowable Membership Fees for PIs / RFs / RAs Funded by the Grant Publications Not allowable Unless the contents have been cleared with Program Manager / TL Office Publications charges can only be supported if it is specifically tied to the deliverables. Purchase of Lab Allowable Supplies, Consumables, The cost of the use of the services and central facilities owned by the University Animals, Use of (e. g. central laboratory services) are allowable and must be based on the Services or Lab University’s fee schedules which are consistently applied regardless of the source Spaces within the of funds. Host Institution’s Central Facilities Lab Safety Allowable Training and Related Expenses Only if the University’s Office of Environment, Health and Safety (EHS) have not already conducted such training. Justification for the training budget should be provided. Other Training Allowable, if the training will benefit the research that the grant intended to support. and Related Justification should be provided. Expenses General training are not allowable. These are covered by funds for staff development. Temasek Laboratories @ SUTD Page 6 Circular – Temasek Lab Grants Date: October 2017 Type of Expenses Description Repairs and Allowable, if equipment is used extensively for the research that the grant is Maintenance of intended to support. Research Equipment The period of maintenance funded from the research grant should be restricted to the duration of the project. For new equipment, maintenance should not be budgeted for any period for which the equipment is under warranty (e. g. Year 1) and quotations for maintenance contract must be included. Staff Retreat Not allowable Stationery & Allowable Printer Consumables If they are meant solely for TL projects usage. Student Assistants Allowable & Student Helpers To request for approval from TL Director prior to engaging the students. The engagement will be on a temporary basis and for the intended project only. PIs are to justify the need for such engagements.
